title: pilosella basifurca
intro: Pilosella basifurca, also known as a subspecies of the plant Pilosella officinarum, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. Pilosella basifurca is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
